name: audiolib.play
description: Fetch background audio from Audiolib for apps, websites, or AI interfaces.

library.description: Audio library name such as audio.focus, audio.sleep, audio.energy

usage_hint: Use this skill when adding background audio to apps, websites, or AI interfaces. Choose a library like audio.focus, audio.sleep, or audio.energy.

audio_url.description: Playable audio URL returned by Audiolib
